queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE (name = 'darktable' OR name LIKE 'darktable %') AND publisher LIKE '%darktable%';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE ((name = 'darktable' OR name LIKE 'darktable %') AND publisher LIKE '%darktable%') AND version_compare(version, '5.6.0') < 0);
